productDisplayName: Highlander Men Solid Poplin Red Shirts
description: CompositionHalf sleeve shirt made of 100% cotton, with black, red, grey and white plaid checks, denim tape detailing on the in-seam of the collar, patch pocket on the left chest with stitch detailing, full length buttoned placket with black buttons, brand name appliqued on the bottom of the facing placket and curved hemlineFittingSlimWash care Machine wash at 40 degree C Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach Tumble dry on normal or line dry Warm iron Get ready to take casual dressing to the next level with this  black, red, grey and white plaid check shirt from highlander. The cool cotton fabric keeps you fresh all day while you hang out with your friends. This shirt can be teamed with low slung jeans and canvas shoes for a laidback look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
